description: Fraud Investigator audit overview — per-user tool-call counts, p50/p95 latency by tool, denied requests by role, and audit volume per day. Reads the audit_events table written by the MCP gateway. Loads against SQLite (default) or ClickHouse via the AUDIT_BACKEND env var; the right datasource is provisioned by config/grafana/provisioning/datasources/audit.yaml.

panels.title: Tool calls per user (last 24h)
panels.description: Count of audit_events grouped by sub. One bar per user; height = total tool-call count over the dashboard time range.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT sub, COUNT(*) AS calls FROM audit_events WHERE ts >= datetime('now', '-1 day') GROUP BY sub ORDER BY calls DESC
targets.rawSql: SELECT sub, COUNT(*) AS calls FROM audit_events WHERE ts >= datetime('now', '-1 day') GROUP BY sub ORDER BY calls DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT sub, COUNT(*) AS calls FROM audit_events WHERE ts >= datetime('now', '-1 day') GROUP BY sub ORDER BY calls DESC

panels.title: Latency p50 / p95 by tool (ms)
panels.description: Per-tool 50th and 95th percentile of latency_ms across the dashboard time range. ClickHouse uses quantile(); SQLite uses an ordinal approximation via ORDER BY + LIMIT/OFFSET window arithmetic on per-tool partitions.

targets.rawSql: WITH ranked AS (SELECT server, tool, latency_ms, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY server, tool ORDER BY latency_ms) AS rn, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY server, tool) AS n FROM audit_events WHERE status = 'ok') SELECT server, tool, MAX(CASE WHEN rn = CAST(0.5 * n + 0.5 AS INTEGER) THEN latency_ms END) AS p50_ms, MAX(CASE WHEN rn = CAST(0.95 * n + 0.5 AS INTEGER) THEN latency_ms END) AS p95_ms, COUNT(*) AS samples FROM ranked GROUP BY server, tool ORDER BY p95_ms DESC
targets.rawQueryText: WITH ranked AS (SELECT server, tool, latency_ms, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY server, tool ORDER BY latency_ms) AS rn, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY server, tool) AS n FROM audit_events WHERE status = 'ok') SELECT server, tool, MAX(CASE WHEN rn = CAST(0.5 * n + 0.5 AS INTEGER) THEN latency_ms END) AS p50_ms, MAX(CASE WHEN rn = CAST(0.95 * n + 0.5 AS INTEGER) THEN latency_ms END) AS p95_ms, COUNT(*) AS samples FROM ranked GROUP BY server, tool ORDER BY p95_ms DESC
targets.queryText: WITH ranked AS (SELECT server, tool, latency_ms, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY server, tool ORDER BY latency_ms) AS rn, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY server, tool) AS n FROM audit_events WHERE status = 'ok') SELECT server, tool, MAX(CASE WHEN rn = CAST(0.5 * n + 0.5 AS INTEGER) THEN latency_ms END) AS p50_ms, MAX(CASE WHEN rn = CAST(0.95 * n + 0.5 AS INTEGER) THEN latency_ms END) AS p95_ms, COUNT(*) AS samples FROM ranked GROUP BY server, tool ORDER BY p95_ms DESC

panels.title: Denied requests by role (stacked)
panels.description: Count of audit_events with status='denied', stacked by deny_reason and grouped by role. A spike here means RBAC is doing its job — investigate per-role to make sure operators have the right scopes.

targets.rawSql: SELECT role, COALESCE(deny_reason, 'unknown') AS deny_reason, COUNT(*) AS denials FROM audit_events WHERE status = 'denied' GROUP BY role, deny_reason ORDER BY denials DESC
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT role, COALESCE(deny_reason, 'unknown') AS deny_reason, COUNT(*) AS denials FROM audit_events WHERE status = 'denied' GROUP BY role, deny_reason ORDER BY denials DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT role, COALESCE(deny_reason, 'unknown') AS deny_reason, COUNT(*) AS denials FROM audit_events WHERE status = 'denied' GROUP BY role, deny_reason ORDER BY denials DESC

panels.title: Audit volume per day
panels.description: Total audit_events written per calendar day. The system-of-record for compliance volume; should grow monotonically with usage.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date(ts) || 'T00:00:00Z' AS time, COUNT(*) AS events FROM audit_events GROUP BY date(ts) ORDER BY time ASC
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT date(ts) || 'T00:00:00Z' AS time, COUNT(*) AS events FROM audit_events GROUP BY date(ts) ORDER BY time ASC
targets.queryText: SELECT date(ts) || 'T00:00:00Z' AS time, COUNT(*) AS events FROM audit_events GROUP BY date(ts) ORDER BY time ASC

title: Fraud Copilot — Audit overview
